titleStmt.title: SII 11.136: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 136. (B.K. No. 85 of 1927-28.) ĀLŪR, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE VĪRABHADRADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription which is in Sanskrit and Kannaḍa belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI). It begins with a formal preamble and gives a long genealogy of the dynasty in the style of the copper-plate grants. This introductory portion very largely agrees with that of the Nīlgunda Plates of this king (Ep. Ind. Vol. XII, pp. 142 ff.). It registers the gift of land, house-sites, etc., made by the king to his servant (leṅka) Mahādēvayya-Nāyaka for the benefit of the temple of Tripurushadēva built by the latter at Māḷad-Ālūru when the former was in his military camp (vijaya-skandhāvāra) of Rājāśraya (See S.I.I. IX, No. 158, l. 60). The Two-Hundred Mahājanas of the village, which was an agrahāra in Māsavāḍi One-Hundred and Forty, received from this Mahādēvayya-Nāyaka, 130 Lokkigadyāṇas and gave in exchange 200 mattar of land, etc., for the purpose of the gift. The grant was made during the regime of Mahāpradhāna, Hērilāḷa-Kannaḍa-sandhivigrahi, Daṇḍanāyaka Raviyaṇa-Bhaṭṭa. It may be noted that ‘Rājāśraya’ was the title of the Western Chālukya king Vinayāditya (Bomb. Gaz., Vol. I, pt. 2, p. 368).
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 16, Prajāpati, Pushya, śu. dvādaśī Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, which regularly corresponds to A.D. 1091, December 25, Thursday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra viśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . śrīyamupahṛtādvaḥ śrīpatiḥ prauḍarōpō vikaṭaviśada daṁṣṭrākrāntaviThis andēp. īnd., Vol. Xīī, pp. 150 ff.
śrāntabhājāṁ Apahadadayadaṁṣṭrākṛṣṭavispaṣṭakāṇḍa pratanu viśajaṭāgra granthivadu yō dharitrī . karimakaramakarikāṁkitajaḷanidhirasanāvaśīkarādvavanivadhūṁ tribhuvanamallivahi
patirakaḷaṁkayaśōṁburāsibaḷayitabhuvanaṁ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā ravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . hariharahiraṇyagarbhāya namaḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanasaṁstoyamānamānabhyāsagōtrāṇāṁ haritaputrāṇāṁ kauśi kīvaraprasādalabdhasvētāta(patra)patrādirājyacihna saptamātṛkōparirakṣitānāṅkārtti
kēyavaraprasādalabdhamayūra�cchakuntadhvajānāṁ bhagavannārāyaṇaprasādāsādita varavarāhalāṁcchanēkasākṣaṇavaśīkritārātirājamaṇḍaḷānāṁ samastabhuva
nāśrayaṁ sarvvalōkāśraya viṣṇuvarddhanaṁ vijayādityādiviśēṣanāmnāṁ rājaratā yudpavabhūtiḥ . kavaḷitanaḷalakṣmīrddurjjayōditvaharī vihatapṛthvīkaḍaṁbāḍaṁbarō mā
ryyanirjjitanijabhujabaḷabhūmnōtpāṭayanu rāṣṭrakūṭānu śrīḷitakaḷachuriśrīrasti cāḷukyavaṁśaḥ . tajjōṣu rājyamanuśālya gatēṣu rājasvēkōnnaṣaṣṭi gaṇanēṣu
purādhyayōdhyaṁ tadvaṁśajāstadanu śōḍaśabhūmipāḷāḥ kṣmādakṣiṇāpathajiṣāṁ vica rāṁbubhūvu duṣṭāvaṣṭabudhāyā katipayapurṣāntarāntaritāyāṁ cāḷukyaku
ḷapadi bhūyaścāḷukyavaṁśayēva . kanda . kīrttilatāṁkurasya kamaḷaṁ lakṣmī nivāsāspadaṁ vajraṁ vairimahībhṛtāṁ pratinidhirddēvasya daityedruhaḥ rājāsīṁ jaya siṁha
bhūpativallabha Iti khyātaścaritrenijairyya rajē ciramādirājacaritōtkaṇṭhauḥ prajānāṁ hranu . yō rāṣṭrakūṭa kulamindu Iti prasiddha kṛṣṇāhvayasya
sutamaṣṭaśatēbhasainyā nijjitya dagdhanṛpapaṁcaśatē bhabhāra bhūyaścaḷukyakulavallabha rājalakṣmīṁ . caṭuḷariputuragapaṭubhaṭakaraṭighaṭakōṭighaṭitaraṇa
rāgaḥ sukṛtaharacaraṇarāgaḥ tanayōbhūttasya raṇarāgaḥ . tattanayaḥ polakēsi nisūdana samō bhavadrājā vatāpipurivarapatirakaḷitakhaḷakaḷikaḷekakaḷaḥ . kanda .
vayamapi polikēsikṣmāpatiṁ varṇnāntaḥ puḷakakaḷitadēhāḥ paśyatādyāpi santaḥ sa hi turagagajēndradgrāmasāraṁ sahaśradvayaparimitanṛtvigyācakārāśvamēdhē . tatta nayā
naḷaniḷayaviḷōpirmauryyaniryyāṇāhētuḥ prathitaprithukadaṁbastaṁbhabhērīkuṭhāraṁ bhuvanabhavanabhagā purāṇāraṁbhabhārabyavasitaśitakīrtti kīrttivarmmā nripōbhūt . tasyā
nujaḥ . sarvvadvīpākramaṇavayasā yasya nausētubandhīrullaṁghyābdhivyathitaprithunā rēvatīdvīpalōpānu rājyaśrīṇāṁ haṭhapatirabhūdyaśca kāḷaccurīṇāṁ vabhrē bhūmissa
hasa sakalai rmmaṁgaḷairmmaṁgaḷīśaḥ . jyēṣṭhabhrātuḥ satisutavarapyarbhakatvādaśakti yasmi nnātvārndha kritahitarammoṁgaḷīśa prithibyāṁ tasminu pratyānēnapi padadharmmāhi yūni sa
tyāśrayāsau cāḷukyānāṁ ka Iva hi pathōdharmya taprabhyavēta . jīturdiśāṁ vijita hariṣamahunripasya dāturmmanōrathaśatādhikamarthayadbhya satyādisarvvaguṇa
ratna gaṇākarasya satyāśrayatvamupalakṣaṇamēva yasya . Adhamarīkritadigvaḷayōrddi tadviḍamarīpatigītamahāyaśāḥ mriḍamatiddabindamanasōdvaha nēḍamatikṣitīśōjani
tōtsātaṁ . sutastadīyō guṇaratnamauḷī bhūvallabhōbhūdbhujavīryyaśāḷī Ādityavarmmōrjjitapuṇyakarmmā tējōbhi rādityasamānadharmmā . tatsutō vikramādityō vikra
makrānta bhūtaḷaḥ tathāpi yuddhamallākhyō yuddhē yamasamā nripāḥ . tajjanmā vijayādityō vīrānēkāṁgasaṁgaraiḥ caturṇnamaṇḍaḷānāmapyuṁjayadvijayōpamān . ©
tadbhavō vikramādityaḥ kīrttivarmmā tadātmajaḥ yēnaścāḷukyarājyaśrīrantarāyiṇya bhūdbhuviḥ . vikramādityabhūpāḷabhrāntā bhīmaparākrama tatsūnuḥ kīrttivarmmā
bhūnmṛtprāsārdditadurjjana . taiḷabhūpa(ḥ)statō jātō vikramādityabhūpatiḥ tatsūnurabhavattasmāt bhīmarājōribhīkaraḥ . taiḷabhū Ajjaṇāryyastutō jajñē yaduvaṁśa
syaśriyaṁ svakāṁ prāpaya(ṁ)nniravaṁśasvaṁ savajraṁ kriṣṇanandanā . Abhavastayōstanujō vibhavavibhāsivirōdhividhvaṁsi tējōvijitādityaḥ satyadhanō vikramādityaḥ .
bēgīśavaṁśatiḷakā lakṣmaṇārājasya naṁdanānnu śīḷāṁ boṁthādēvīṁ vidhivatu pariṇinnē vikramādityaḥ . sutamiva vasudēvāddēvakī vāsudēvaṁ guhamiva girijāmirddē
vamarddhēṁdumauḷēḥ Ajanayadatha boṁthādēbyataḥ staiḷabhūpaḥ vibhavavijitaśakraṁ vikra mādityanāmnāṁ . karikuṁbhikuṁbhabhēdanaripudurggakavāṭabhaṁjanaprabhṟitisahajabaḷasya harēriva bā
ḷakṛḍābhavadyasya . kiṁca rāṣṭrakūṭakuḷarājya saṁbuddhābubhā . Ajjityācaraṇa vivapra caḷitau sākṣātkadēkramataḥ krūrau baddhaśarīrakau gurujanarddrōhapprarōhā viva kāḷā
t�ṁḍitarāṣṭrakūṭakakuḷaśīvalli jātāṁkurau lōṇayēna sukhēna karkkara raṇa staṁbhaṁ raṇiprāṁgaṇē . Itthaṁ purā ditisutēriva bhūtadhātrīṁ yō rāṣṭrakūṭa kuṭiḷai
rggamitāmadhastātu Uddhritya mādhava Ivādivarāharūpō vabhrē caḷukyakulavallabha rājalakṣmīṁ . bhaṇmaharaṭṭādabhavadbhūpāḷā(r)ddrā(r)ṣṭrakūṭakuḷatiḷakātu lakṣmīriva śaḷi
ḷanidhē śrījākabbāhvayā kanyā . cāḷukyavaṁśāvarabhānmāḷī śrītailabhūpāḷa U pāyataināṁ tayōśca lōkābhyudayāya yōgaḥ sacandrikācandramasō
rivāsīt . śrītaiḷabhūmipāḷāt śrījākabbā samajījanatō śrīmatsatyāśraya skaṁdamaṁbikātryiyambikādiva . tasyānujaśśrī daśavarmmanāmā tadvallabhā
bhāgyavetīti dēvī tayōrabhūdvikramaśīḷaśāḷī śrīvikramādityanripastanūjaḥ . Asau nijajyēṣṭa bitaṟparōkṣaṁ vabhārā nidritāṁ dharitrīṁ
bhujēna kēyūralatāmivō(r)cyairvvidāritārātikada(ṁ)mbakēna . tadanu tasyānuja hiṁsadāvanastaṁ paṭu(ṭu)vikramādyō madāndhagandhēbhaghaṭāvipāṭī dharōrjjitaprassurita(ḥ)prabhāvō ra
rāja yoṁśau jayasiṁharājaḥ . tataḥ pratāpa(ḥ)jvaḷanaprabhāvanirmmūḷanirddagdha virōdhidantaḥ . tasyātmajaḥ pāyitā dharāyā śrīmānabhūdāhavamalladēvaḥ . tasyātma
jāyatajagajjavitapramōdaśriṁgāravīrarasikaḥ kavilōkakāntaḥ kāntāvilōḷavaya �ḷacārucandraścāḷukyavaṁśatiḷakō bhuvanaykamallaḥ tadanu(ḥ)
tasyānujaḥ . Āsī�jaḥkalitakamaḷōllāsanaḥ prauḍhapādaḥ sparṣāduccaiśriyamava bhracchēka rāṇādadhā� dhvāntabhrāntidadhadiva driśōraṁjanaṁ vairivī�smārākṣī ṇāṁ mmau
hurapaharanvikramādityadēvaḥ bhūvīrannamitaphaṇīśvaraṁ bhujābhyāṁ vibhrāṇaṁ paṭaha palāyataṁ kṣitīśaḥ yaścēccairapahritanākiśākhiḷīḷaḥ prakhyāta
stṛbhuvanamalla Ityudāraḥ . yātōnyēṣṭaṁ janakajanitāvallabhōdāralakṣmībhrātrā sārddhaṁ harivaḷayutaṁ svāsamitrātmajēna tīrē sinmayirvvahimukhabhayāddai
tya vaibhīṣaṇaśrīdhāmnānēmē draviḷapatinā yaśca cāḷukyarāmaḥ . sarvvēśāṁ vija yaprayāṇasamaya jātākhiḷōrvvīpada prasthānēva mahīmatītya vi
maḷā yatkīrttirabdhiṁgatāḥ prēśyastē vijayaśriyā paravaśā dūrīkarō tyaiśumā mityākhyātumivārṇnavasthitijuṣaḥ saurēstriḷōkīgurōḥ . sa tu śrī
prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaḥ kuśaḷī sarvvānēva yathāsaṁba
ddhyamānyakānu rāṣṭrapati viśeyapati grāmakūṭakāyuktakaniyuktakādhikārika mahattarādīnsamādisatyastuvaḥ saṁviditaṁ yadhāsmābhiḥ . rājāvaḷi
ssamāptaḥ . Ālōlajaladhivēṣṭita bhūlōkadoḷeseva māḷadālūroḷu tannālayadoḷu sukhamiḷpaṁ līleye tauduṁba periya māḷaṁkryāḷa . tatsuta . Ācāraṁ
pēḷvaḍe manvācāraṁ sakaḷavidye tanagadu hṛdyaṁ vācakadoḷvācaspati dēceyabhaṭṭa lalāṭapaṭṭaṁ dvijaroḷu . Ātana kulavadhu vinayōpēte mahāsati mahāpatibra
te puruśaprītiyoḷ negaḷvaḷendu mahītaḷavā cākaṇabbeyaṁ pogaḷadarāru . tatsuta . Ātage samastaguṇōpētaṁge mahānbhāvage maga prītiyoḷe
puṭṭidaṁ raghujitasutapratimanenipa mahādēvayyaṁ . guṇada tavarmane guṇanidhi guṇābdhiguṇamēruvenisi saṁdirṛda mahāguṇanidhi mahadēvayyaṁ triṇe
yanapādābjabhṛṁga vāḷdana siṁga . Ātaṁ samastaguṇanidhānaṁ leṁkapradhānaṁ leṁkamāṇi kyaṁ nīticāṇākyaṁ budhajanasarōjinīrājahaṁsaṁ sarasvatīkarṇnāvataṁsaṁ
śrīvasiṣṭagōtrasamuddharaṇaṁ bandhucintāmaṇi vivēkacūḍāmaṇi śrīmatribhuvanamalla dēvara leṁkaṁ mahādēvayyanāyakargge . svasti samastapraśastisa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna hērilāḷakannaḍasandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ raviyaṇabhaṭṭa rāḷkeyalu . cāḷukyavikramavarṣē śōḍaśē prajāpati saṁva
tsarē pravarttamānē tadantarggata puśya śuddha dvādasyāṁ brihaspativārē Uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇaparvvaṇi bahūni mahādānāni datvā taddakṣiṇakālē rājā
śrayasamāvāsitavijayaskandhāvārē leṁka mādiyaṇēna māḷadālūrugrāmē kārita tripurṣadēvāyatana khaṇḍasphuṭita nava karmmārtthaṁ pu(ḥ)
ḻpārghyāgandhadhūpa�panivēdyādyarccanārtthaṁ gītavādyanrityārtthaṁ ca māsavāḍi catvāriṁśadadhikaśatamadhyē Agrahāraṁ mmāḷadālūru grāmē Uttaradiśāyāṁ
koḷaṁpeItatkācca bhūkṣētrē bhūmivarttanaṁ śatadvayantathā baṭṭakeṟegērimadhyē grihanivēśanāni catvāri baṇaṁbevoṭṭu tathā tatusama
staṁ sarvvanamasyānāṁ śāsanīkritya dattaṁ yadyapi rājadattantathāpi . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhā rāyajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇa saṁpa
nnarappa śrīmadagrahāraṁmmāḷadālūra Ūroḍeyapramukha mahājanavinnūrvaruṁ grāmakāryyanimittavāgi pasāyitaṁ leṁka surigeya mahādēvayya
nāyakara kaiyyalu koṁḍa lokkiya parivarttakadaccina poṁgadyāṇaṁ nūṟamūvattu Aṁkadoḷ poṁgadyāṇa 130 kka koṭṭa bhūmiya staḷa Iṭṭageya polada mēre
yiṁ banniyakeṟeya sthaḷadalu koṭṭa keyi mattaru 200 kkaṁ sīme baḍagalu Allamēśvara dēvara keyi Alliṁ paḍuvalu biṭṭa vrittiya keyi Aliṁ paḍuvalu haṭṭa
gāṟarakeyi paḍuvaṇa sīme Aṁgaḍiya dāvaṇnana satrakke biṭṭakeyyiṁ mūḍalu tikimayyana satrada keyyiṁ paḍuvalu seṭṭigeyyiṁ baḍagalu piriyasatra
da keyyiṁ baḍagalu baṭṭakeṟagēriyalekkayyamane nālku baṇaṁbe voṭṭeraḍu tōṭa Antanitakkaṁ Innūrvvaru sarvvabādhāparihāravāgi pratipāḷisuvaru . śrī saraśvatye namaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
